user.title: ITRA Runner Setup
user.description: Enter the public ITRA RunnerSpace profile URL and polling interval.

data_description.runner_url: Full URL to the ITRA RunnerSpace profile, e.g. https://itra.run/RunnerSpace/username.123
data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the ITRA page (minimum 10800 s = 3 h, default 14400 s = 4 h).
data_description.user_agent: Custom HTTP User-Agent header. Leave empty to use the default.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the ITRA page. Check the URL and your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This ITRA runner is already configured.
